caption: A man with long dark hair tied back and glasses stands before a microphone, singing and playing a light-colored guitar. He is dressed in a white collared shirt, a black vest with blue floral embroidery, and a red and white patterned accessory tucked into his vest. He is positioned in an indoor setting against a backdrop of horizontal tan blinds. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, suggesting an audience. On the right side of the scene, the text "ORCA" is displayed in white letters on a dark rectangular background. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, though his facial expressions shift slightly as he sings and his hand moves subtly on the guitar. The composition and lighting remain consistent throughout the scene.
